name: FortiGate Antivirus Botnet Warning
description: Detects FortiGate antivirus alerts indicating potential botnet activity.

prompts.prompt: A FortiGate antivirus alert for potential botnet activity has been triggered. This is a high-risk indicator of compromise and ongoing command-and-control communication. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Source Address** {source_address}, **Destination Address** {destination_address}, **Source Interface** {srcintf}, **Destination Interface** {dstintf}, **Botnet Signature/Name** {attack}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **Virtual Domain (VDOM)** {vdom}, **Source Country** {source_country}, **Destination Country** {destination_country}. Investigate this critical botnet warning immediately to prevent further compromise and mitigate impact.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the botnet warning.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address involved in the botnet activity.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address involved in the botnet activity.

parameters.name: srcintf
parameters.description: The source network interface on the FortiGate.

parameters.name: dstintf
parameters.description: The destination network interface on the FortiGate.

parameters.name: attack
parameters.description: The specific botnet signature or name detected.

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate log ID for the botnet detection (9248).

parameters.name: vdom
parameters.description: The Virtual Domain (VDOM) where the botnet activity was detected.

parameters.name: source_country
parameters.description: The country of origin for the source IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: destination_country
parameters.description: The country of the destination IP (enriched via GeoIP).
